'''favama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okhotskite|okhotskite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okhotskite|okhotskite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| favama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fævæmæth || fævæmæj || fævæmæsh || fævæmæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || favavamath || favavamaj || favavamash || favavama
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || favamath || favamaj || favamash || favama
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || favafmafth || favafmafj || favafmafsh || favafmaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || favamatha || favamaja || favamasha || favamaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || favamath || favamaj || favamash || favama
|-
| [[Possessive]] || favamathal || favamajal || favamashal || favamakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || favamaathatha || favamaajaja || favamaashasha || favamaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || favamathan || favamajan || favamashan || favamakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || favamathaoro || favamajaoro || favamashaoro || favamakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
